name: Wine of the Blood
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

This wine, prepared using the blood of a creature with overwhelming vitality, soothes the body, mind, and spirit with a temporary sense of euphoria and rest. When you drink wine of the blood, you recover ] Hit Points. Additionally, the wine attempts to counteract every negative emotion effect affecting you, with a counteract rank of 3 and a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+9 #Counteract]]{+9}. Lastly, you gain a +1 status bonus to all Will saves and a +2 status bonus against emotion effects for 1 minute.
